title: rubus × impuripulvis
intro: Rubus × impuripulvis, also known as the hybrid raspberry or hybrid thimbleberry, is a cross between the Rubus idaeus (red raspberry) and Rubus fruticosus (black raspberry). This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of anthocyanins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × impuripulvis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Rubus × impuripulvis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
